results.title: Is Outrage Against Ananya Panday's Bharatnatyam Dance In Chand Mera Dil Really Justified?
results.description: Ananya Panday’s Bharatanatyam performance in Vivek Soni’s Chand Mera Dil has sparked fierce online backlash. But beyond the trolling and memes lies a bigger question - is the criticism truly justified?
